name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: The app is now named "DRW" — you'll see it as the browser title and under the app icon when you install it to your home screen.
Withdrawals have a "Store + actual paid" option: split how much comes from store credit and from the bank — the leftover becomes unclaimed credit.
Dates read in a clearer day-month-year style everywhere (e.g. 26-Jun-26) and times include seconds.
